---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Kritika"
date: "2026-03-10"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r median_inter_target_time_lab, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)

# -----------------------------
# Folder paths
# -----------------------------

lab_single_path <- "/home/kritika/MTech/Sem4/BRSM/Project/Attention Task Validation/data_brsm/single/lab"
lab_multiple_path <- "/home/kritika/MTech/Sem4/BRSM/Project/Attention Task Validation/data_brsm/multiple/lab"

# -----------------------------
# Get CSV files
# -----------------------------

single_files <- list.files(lab_single_path, pattern="*.csv", full.names=TRUE)
multiple_files <- list.files(lab_multiple_path, pattern="*.csv", full.names=TRUE)

# -----------------------------
# Safe reader
# -----------------------------

read_safe <- function(file){

  df <- read.csv(file,
                 stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
                 colClasses = "character")

  df <- df[!is.na(df$mouse.time), ]

  df$time_ms <- as.numeric(str_extract(df$mouse.time, "[0-9.]+")) * 1000
  df$level <- as.numeric(df$trials.thisN) + 1

  return(df)
}

# -----------------------------
# Load files
# -----------------------------

lab_single <- bind_rows(lapply(single_files, read_safe))
lab_multiple <- bind_rows(lapply(multiple_files, read_safe))

lab_single$TaskType <- "Single"
lab_multiple$TaskType <- "Multiple"

lab_data <- bind_rows(lab_single, lab_multiple)

# -----------------------------
# Compute inter-target times
# -----------------------------

lab_data <- lab_data %>%
  arrange(level, time_ms) %>%
  group_by(level) %>%
  mutate(inter_target_time = time_ms - lag(time_ms)) %>%
  ungroup()

# -----------------------------
# Median inter-target time
# -----------------------------

median_inter_target <- lab_data %>%
  group_by(TaskType, level) %>%
  summarise(
    MedianInterTargetTime = median(inter_target_time, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# -----------------------------
# Single target = 0
# -----------------------------

median_inter_target$MedianInterTargetTime[
  median_inter_target$TaskType == "Single"
] <- 0

# -----------------------------
# Plot
# -----------------------------

ggplot(median_inter_target,
       aes(x = level,
           y = MedianInterTargetTime,
           color = TaskType)) +

  geom_line(size = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +

  labs(
    title = "Median Inter-Target Time Across Trial (Lab Task)",
    x = "Trial Number",
    y = "Median Inter-Target Time (ms)",
    color = "Task Type"
  ) +

  scale_color_manual(values = c("#E64B35", "#4DBBD5")) +

  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
